text: On November 12, 2025, American Express expanded its small business support initiatives with a new $5 million Amex Shop Small Grants Program, building on its Small Business Saturday platform created in 2010. The company also announced a content partnership with creator and small business advocate Keith Lee, and is providing free customized signage for small businesses. Additionally, American Express presented at the KBW Fintech Payments Conference 2025 on November 12, 2025, where management discussed strategic priorities with investors.
